name: page-pilot-skill
description: Semantic page analysis and Playwright authoring assistant for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze pages and help write reliable Playwright automation
interface.longDescription: Use a local headless Playwright MCP bridge plus a Codex skill to scan pages, validate key interactions, and generate more reliable Playwright automation code.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a page headlessly and help me write reliable Playwright automation
